title: Elytra Auto Jump
description: When you touch the ground while flying and holding the jump button you will automatically jump and start flying again, which causes you to bounce off the ground.
body:
# Elytra Auto Jump

When you touch the ground while flying and holding the jump button you will automatically jump and start flying again, which causes you to bounce off the ground.

# Config

This causes the client to jump on the tick that the elytra is deployed after touching the ground; causing the player to gain an extra block of height. This is possible in vanilla but is hard to execute due to prescise timing requirements.
boolean `do_additional_jump` = true

boolean `enabled` = true
